column4: Reference (do not change column order; End may be left empty; Nr = repeat performance of line N)

column1: #   all share the same time base (mix.py vocal-shift=0; only 3s of padding at the tail).
# Generation method (2026-07-05): faster-whisper large-v3-turbo word-level ASR + RMS phrase segmentation,
#   cross-validated; the repeated chorus was mirror-checked via "chorus 1 → tail-section offset +74.53s"; all three agree.
# ⚠ Important structural finding: the audio actually sings only 20 lines = 1-16 + a repeat of the chorus (7/8/9/10);
#   the bridge (17-20) and the chorus-2-only lines (23/25) from the v1 document are not in the audio
#   (evidence: tail-section MFCC similarity 0.838 vs control pair 0.359; even with a prompt, ASR still transcribes
#   そっとそっと. See the appendix of docs/phase0_notes.md for details).
# Already includes a 0.15s lead-in and ≤0.35s hold-over; apply a global offset with make_subs.py --shift.

column4: 教壇で僕らに難題を明るく
ペンと黒板眠い目蓋を照らす
言葉は熱を帯びて僕らに届く
迷わず揺らず　道を前に示す
その時怖くて曖昧な明日
君がいる　向こう見ず
雪峰先生忘られず
そっとそっと僕の手を繋ぐ
雪峰先生　覚えてる
勇気の全部君がくれた
チョーク粉肩に乗る雪より静
笑顔で褒めて「未来はまだ遠い」
何度も真夜中手紙をめくる
君が言った言葉心に浮かぶ
どんな風に吹かれても
逃げずに　その丘の方へ
雪峰先生忘られず
そっとそっと僕の手を繋ぐ
雪峰先生　覚えてる
勇気の全部君がくれた
